violations.text: Shellfish tags were observed lacking the date of last sold shellfish and not in chronological order. Proper record keeping of shellfish tags reviewed. Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (scrappers, knives and meat saw) were observed with an accumulation of food debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Proper cleaning of equipment reviewed. PIC moved scrappers, knives and meat saw parts to be washed, rinsed and sanitized in 3-bay sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

The loading/receiving door to the outside, located in the (produce back area and grocery back room), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC placed service order. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025

The meat room, located in the Meat department area was not in good repair. Ambient observed at 50-52 degrees Fahrenheit. Meat room shall maintain an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. No TCS foods observed stored in the meat room at the time of this inspection. -Service was contacted during this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

The produce sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives) were observed with an accumulation of food debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Per PIC Knives were removed from knife storage rack and put in 3 bay sink to be washed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

Per interview of staff, slicers are only washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the end of the day. The surfaces of equipment that contacts time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as meats and cheeses must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours. Proper cleaning instructions of slicer was reviewed and explained to PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

Chemical spray bottles were stored above deli slicers and food prep table. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. PIC moved chemicals at time of inspection and placed chemicals in proper area. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024
Knives were observed stored behind unclean surface of knife storage container attached to wall. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package. Single service items are required to be stored in original package when not in use. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (vent filter covers/fan nets, several honeycombs in coolers) have an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024
Observed 3 bay sink being used to wash produce with an inadequate air gap. Establishment to remove rubber that is forming connection to floor drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024
The (tiles) in the (meat department ) area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

Chemicals were stored with utensils. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Chemicals were relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023

The tiles in the retail area are in poor repair (water damage.) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Per PIC, roof was recently replaced and all tiles will be replaced within the next couple weeks. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023

Various spots of the establishment have an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023
